showcase.title: {{Topic}} Resources in the NIAID Data Ecosystem
showcase.description: This section provides a visual summary of the resources available within the NIAID Discovery Portal for _{{topic}}_ research. The graphics below highlight key metadata elements to help you find relevant data and refine your search for more targeted results. [View all search results related to _{{topic}}_]({{query}}).

treemaplist.title: Resources mentioning _{{topic}}_ also mentioned the following:
treemaplist.description: _{{Topic}}_ datasets, computational tools, and resource catalogs also encompass different Health Conditions, Pathogens, and Measurement Techniques. Use the interactive figures below to help identify resources that advance your research needs.

types.title: Data Types
types.description: The NIAID Data Ecosystem currently ingests metadata for Datasets, Computational Tools and Resource Catalogs. Click on a type of resource to conduct a type-specific search for _{{topic}}_ resources.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.description: _{{Topic}}_ researchers share their datasets, computational tools and other resources by depositing them in a variety of different repositories.  Use the visualization to explore the resources in the NIAID Data Ecosystem by source.

conditions-of-access.title: Conditions Of Access
conditions-of-access.description: Access requirements, like whether registration or a data use agreement (DUA) is needed to access a resource, aren’t always clear. Use the visualization to see how access conditions are distributed and click any category to filter _{{topic}}_ resources by that access type.
